title: SecurityBindingDocument
description: The persisted form of a claim→rule binding (design §14.2): per-verb grants plus audit and optimistic-concurrency metadata. Backends store this document verbatim.

claimType.description: The principal claim type this binding keys on ('*' matches any authenticated principal).

claimValue.description: The required claim value; absent matches any value of claimType.

scopes.description: Capability scopes (design §14.1) this binding grants the matched principal, unioned into the principal's effective scopes at authentication time. Absent or empty grants no capability (a reach-only binding).

createdBy.description: The actor that created the binding.

lastUpdatedBy.description: The actor that last updated the binding, if any.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When the binding was last updated, if ever.

VerbGrantInfo.title: VerbGrantInfo
VerbGrantInfo.description: A per-verb grant: either unrestricted (full reach) or the conjunction of the named rules.

unrestricted.description: When true, the verb is unrestricted (full reach); ruleNames is ignored.

ruleNames.description: The rule names ANDed for the verb.
